description: Phase 3: Billing, Auth & Teams - Team workspaces with multi-tenancy, role-based access control (owner/admin/member/viewer), usage metering (emails sent, contacts, sequences, team members), and Stripe billing integration (Free/Pro/Enterprise plans, checkout sessions, webhooks, usage-based overage).
steps: 1. Add Prisma models: Workspace (id, name, slug, plan: free/pro/enterprise, stripeCustomerId?, stripeSubscriptionId?, physicalAddress?, createdAt, updatedAt), WorkspaceMember (id, workspaceId, userId, role: owner/admin/member/viewer, invitedAt, joinedAt), WorkspaceInvite (id, workspaceId, email, role, token, expiresAt, createdAt), UsageRecord (id, workspaceId, metric: emails_sent/contacts_stored/sequences_active/team_members, value, period: daily/monthly, periodStart, periodEnd, createdAt), BillingEvent (id, workspaceId, stripeEventId, type, data Json, createdAt).
2. Update User model to add workspaceId (optional) and currentWorkspaceId fields.
4. Add shared types: WORKSPACE_ROLE, WORKSPACE_PLAN, USAGE_METRIC, BILLING_EVENT_TYPE in packages/shared/src/types/index.ts.
5. Add schemas: workspaceSchema, workspaceMemberSchema, workspaceInviteSchema, usageRecordSchema, billingPlanSchema in packages/shared/src/schemas/index.ts.
6. Create apps/api/src/services/workspace.ts: createWorkspace, getWorkspace, updateWorkspace, switchWorkspace, inviteMember(email, role), acceptInvite(token), removeMember, updateMemberRole.

7. Create apps/api/src/services/rbac.ts: checkPermission(userId, workspaceId, requiredRole), requireRole middleware factory that checks workspace membership and role. Permissions: owner (all + billing), admin (all except billing), member (use features, no delete), viewer (read-only).

8. Create apps/api/src/services/usage-metering.ts: trackUsage(workspaceId, metric, increment), getUsage(workspaceId, period), getDailyUsage, getMonthlyUsage, checkQuota(workspaceId, metric) - returns whether usage is within plan limits.

9. Create apps/api/src/services/billing.ts: createCheckoutSession(workspaceId, plan), handleStripeWebhook(event), getSubscription(workspaceId), cancelSubscription, getInvoices(workspaceId), calculateOverage(workspaceId). Plan limits: Free (100 emails/mo, 500 contacts), Pro (5000 emails/mo, 10000 contacts), Enterprise (unlimited).

10. Create apps/api/src/routes/workspaces.ts: GET /api/workspaces, POST /api/workspaces, GET /api/workspaces/:id, PUT /api/workspaces/:id, POST /api/workspaces/:id/invite, GET /api/workspaces/:id/members, DELETE /api/workspaces/:id/members/:userId, POST /api/workspaces/switch.

11. Create apps/api/src/routes/billing.ts: POST /api/billing/checkout, GET /api/billing/subscription, POST /api/billing/cancel, GET /api/billing/invoices, GET /api/billing/usage, POST /webhook/stripe (public - no auth, verify Stripe signature).
12. Register routes in index.ts. Stripe webhook is public (no auth but signature verified).
13. Update mockDb.ts with workspace, workspaceMember, workspaceInvite, usageRecord, billingEvent models.
14. Add factory functions: buildWorkspace, buildWorkspaceMember, buildWorkspaceInvite, buildUsageRecord, buildBillingEvent.
15. Create service tests: workspace.test.ts, rbac.test.ts, usage-metering.test.ts, billing.test.ts.
acceptance_criteria: Workspaces can be created with team member invitations
Role-based access correctly restricts actions (viewer cannot modify, member cannot delete, admin cannot access billing)
Usage metering tracks emails sent, contacts, sequences, team members
Billing checkout creates a session, webhook handling processes subscription events
Plan quotas are enforced (Free: 100 emails/mo, Pro: 5000, Enterprise: unlimited)
verification: Run `npm test` from /projects/sandbox/lead-genius-pre- and confirm all tests pass
Run `npx tsc --noEmit` in apps/api to confirm no TypeScript errors
findings: All 108 new tests pass (workspace: 25, rbac: 18, usage-metering: 15, billing: 21, workspaces route: 16, billing route: 13). Full suite passes with 812 tests total. Pre-existing TS errors in demo.pipeline.test.ts, middleware/auth.ts, email-sandbox.ts, external-email-test.ts, smtp-server.test.ts remain unchanged. Prisma client regenerated with Workspace, WorkspaceMember, WorkspaceInvite, UsageRecord, BillingEvent models. User model extended with currentWorkspaceId field.
